rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"Verification-only tasks (no code changes) still require full exploration — the agent traced executeDecompose and createWorktree in dist/bin/cli.js before confirming behavior.","scope":"build stage"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Decompose pipeline design: executeDecompose returns either sub-tasks (parallel branch) or null (fallback trigger), making the null path the explicit fallback signal.","scope":"decompose pipeline"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Decompose verification targets live in dist/bin/cli.js rather than src — line numbers like 18529 and 19071 reference the compiled output.","scope":"engine dist artifact"}]}
